Quality Education.reason: The course is a core component of tertiary education (Target 4.3), providing students with specialized skills in historical research, academic writing, and critical analysis (Target 4.4).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course emphasizes "academic ethics" and "norms," contributing to accountable institutions (Target 16.6). The film 'Denial' highlights justice and truth-seeking, aligning with promoting rule of law (Target 16.3).
